annotation_record.object_type.business_definition: The type of object or entity that the annotation pertains to.

annotation_record.annotation_type.business_definition: The type of annotation, specifying what information or summary is contained in the record.

annotation_record.editor_name.business_definition: The name of the person who made an edit or comment on a document.

change_request.object_type.business_definition: The type of asset, process, or system that is the subject of the change request.

change_request.is_deleted.business_definition: Indicates whether the change request has been deleted.

checklist.model_name.business_definition: The category or type of checklist item, such as Incident, Fraud, AML/KYC, etc.

checklist.is_completed.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the checklist item or task has been completed.

checklist_template.name.business_definition: The name or title of the checklist template.

checklist_template.description.business_definition: A brief description or explanation of what the checklist template is used for.

checklist_template.is_mandatory.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a specific point in the checklist is mandatory or not.

checklist_template.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the checklist template is currently active and available for use.

comment.message_type.business_definition: The type or category of the comment, indicating its purpose or context.

counterparty_details.party_name.business_definition: The official name of the counterparty involved in financial transactions.

counterparty_details.alias_name.business_definition: Alternative names or aliases used by the counterparty in financial transactions.

counterparty_details.first_name.business_definition: The primary name by which this counterparty is known.

counterparty_details.middle_name.business_definition: The secondary name by which this counterparty is known, often in the middle of their full name.

counterparty_details.last_name.business_definition: The surname by which this counterparty is known, usually at the end of their full name.

counterparty_details.suffix_name.business_definition: A suffix indicating the gender or formal status of the individual.

counterparty_details.title.business_definition: The formal or respectful term used to address an individual.

counterparty_details.job_title.business_definition: The professional or occupational position of an individual.

counterparty_details.individual_or_entit.business_definition: The type of counterparty, either an individual or an entity (e.g., company, organization).

counterparty_details.type_of_business.business_definition: The category of business activity associated with the counterparty (redacted).

counterparty_details.source_of_funds.business_definition: The origin or source of funds used by the counterparty (e.g., inheritance, investment, earnings).

counterparty_details.foreign_public_offi.business_definition: Indicates whether the counterparty is a foreign public official.

counterparty_supplementary_info.normaliz.business_definition: The standardized name of the counterpart party, which is consistent across different representations.

counterparty_supplementary_info.alias_na.business_definition: Any alternative or informal names used by the counterpart party.

counterparty_supplementary_info.type_of_.business_definition: The industry or sector in which the counterpart party operates.

counterparty_supplementary_info.email.business_definition: A contact email address for the counterparty.

counterparty_supplementary_info.website_.business_definition: A website URL for the counterparty.

dashboard_items.kind.business_definition: The type of item displayed on the dashboard, such as a chart or a tile.

dashboard_items.key.business_definition: A unique name or code that identifies the specific type of item, such as 'rfi_ageing_bottlenecks' for a chart.

dashboard_items.title.business_definition: A concise description of the content or subject matter displayed on a dashboard item.

dashboard_items.visible.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the dashboard item should be displayed to users or not.

dashboard_items.function_name.business_definition: The specific function or scenario being monitored on the dashboard.

dashboards.slug.business_definition: A concise, URL-friendly string used to identify a dashboard.

dashboards.title.business_definition: A human-readable name given to a dashboard.

dashboards.model_name.business_definition: The type or category of data or processes visualized on the dashboard.

dashboards.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the dashboard is currently available and being used.

dashboards.factory.business_definition: The type or category of factory that generated the data used in the dashboard.

document_category_master.category_name.business_definition: The name of a category under which documents are classified.

document_ingestion_registry.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the document ingestion service is currently active or inactive for a given tenant.

document_ingestion_registry.entity_name.business_definition: The name of the tenant or entity for which the document is being ingested.

document_ingestion_registry.file_name.business_definition: The name of the document being ingested.

document_ingestion_registry.file_ext.business_definition: The file extension of the document being ingested.

document_ingestion_registry.is_deleted.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the document has been deleted.

document_ingestion_registry.deleted_by.business_definition: The identifier of the user who deleted this document ingestion record.

document_tags.tag_name.business_definition: The name or category of the document tag used for categorization and search purposes.

document_type_master.type_name.business_definition: The name of a specific type of document.

document_type_master.filename_prefix.business_definition: The prefix used in filenames for documents of a specific type.

document_type_master.is_pii.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a document type contains personally identifiable information (PII).

documents.size.business_definition: The size of the document in bytes.

documents.object_type.business_definition: The type of object that the document is related to, such as a counterparty or global data.

documents.is_temp.business_definition: Indicates whether the document is a temporary file that will be deleted soon.

documents.is_deleted.business_definition: Indicates whether the document has been deleted.

external_users.user_details.business_definition: The email address of the external user.

external_users.auth_method.business_definition: The method used by the external user for authentication.

external_users.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the external user account is currently active or not.

feature.description.business_definition: A detailed explanation of what each system feature does.

feature.name.business_definition: The name or label given to each system feature.

feature.display_name.business_definition: A human-readable name for the system feature.

group.description.business_definition: A brief description or summary of the group.
values: UAT test group created during TC-045 execution

group.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the group is currently active or not.

group.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the workflow for this group, such as 'Pending Approval' or 'Approved'.

group.owned_by.business_definition: The unique identifier of the individual or group that owns this particular group.

group.owned_by_group.business_definition: A boolean flag indicating whether the group is owned by another group or not.

incident.incident_status.business_definition: The current status of an incident (e.g., Open, New, Waive, Escalated).

incident.is_investigation.business_definition: Indicates whether an investigation is currently underway for the incident.

incident.owned_by.business_definition: The department or individual responsible for managing and resolving an incident.

incident.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the incident's workflow process.

incident.object_type.business_definition: The category or type of the incident, indicating its level of severity or classification.

incident.owned_by_group.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the incident is currently owned by a group for management.

incident.is_current_queue.business_definition: Indicates whether the incident is currently being processed or has been resolved.

labels: rfi step enabled request for information
incident.rfi_step_enabled.business_definition: Indicates whether the Request for Information (RFI) step is enabled or not.

incident.is_backfilled.business_definition: Indicates whether the incident data has been retroactively populated or added to the system.

incident.is_sampled.business_definition: Indicates whether the incident data is part of a sample set or the full dataset.

incident.decision_type.business_definition: The type of decision made regarding an incident, e.g., approval, rejection.

incident.priority.business_definition: The level of urgency or importance associated with the incident.

incident_signal_score.risk_level.business_definition: A categorical classification based on the calculated risk score, indicating the potential impact of an incident.

investigation_and_research_counter_party.business_definition: The full name of the counter-party associated with an incident.
The current state of the investigation process related to a counter-party.
The current status of the counter-party, indicating whether it is new or open.
The department or team responsible for managing the counter-party.
Indicates whether the counter-party is a customer of the organization.
Indicates whether this record is related to an active investigation of a counter-party.
Indicates whether the counter-party is owned by a group within the organization.

level.display_name.business_definition: A human-readable name or label for the level or category.

level.description.business_definition: Additional information or notes about the level or category.

ml_use_case.name.business_definition: The name or description of a specific machine learning use case.

ml_use_case.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the machine learning use case is currently active or not.

module.description.business_definition: A detailed description of the functionality provided by each module or feature.

module.code.business_definition: A technical code or identifier used internally within the system to reference each module or feature.

module.display_name.business_definition: A user-friendly name or label used in the user interface to identify each module or feature.

notification.event.business_definition: The type of event that triggered the notification.

notification.mode.business_definition: The method by which the notification was delivered.

notification.notification_name.business_definition: The name or type of the notification triggered within the system.

notification.notification_type.business_definition: The category or purpose of the notification.

notification.status.business_definition: The current state of the notification, indicating whether it has been sent or delivered.

notification.is_read.business_definition: Indicates whether the notification has been read by the recipient.

notification.subject.business_definition: A brief description or category of the notification.

notification.critical.business_definition: Indicates whether the notification is critical and requires immediate attention.

notification.severity.business_definition: The level of importance or urgency associated with the notification.

organizations.name.business_definition: The official name of an organization.

organizations.description.business_definition: A brief description or note about an organization.
values: UAT Test Child Org under SBI - Edited
UAT Test Top-Level Organization under dbs_Updated Description

organizations.is_approved.business_definition: Indicates whether the organization has been approved within the system.

organizations.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the organization is currently active or not.

party_research.link.business_definition: A URL or link associated with the research activity, such as a report or document.

party_research.title.business_definition: A title or name given to a research activity.

party_research.sentiment_type.business_definition: The overall emotional tone or sentiment associated with the research activity.

password_policy.description.business_definition: A human-readable description of the password policy rule.

password_policy.approved.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the password policy rule has been approved for use.

password_policy.created_by.business_definition: The entity that created the password policy rule.

password_policy.updated_by.business_definition: The user who last modified the password policy rule.

password_policy.is_deleted.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the password policy rule has been logically deleted.

password_rule.rule.business_definition: The specific type of rule governing password complexity or content.

password_rule.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the password rule is currently active or not.

password_security_questions.question.business_definition: A predefined security question used for password recovery.
values: What street did you live on in third grade?
What is your maternal grandmother's maiden name?
What is the first name of the boy or girl that you first kissed?
What is your oldest cousin's first and last name?
What is the middle name of your oldest child?
In what city or town was your first job?
What was the name of your first stuffed animal?
What is your oldest sibling's middle name?

password_security_questions.example_answ.business_definition: Predefined example answers for each security question.

password_security_questions.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a security question is currently active and available for use.

password_security_questions.is_deleted.business_definition: Indicates whether the security question record has been logically deleted.

permission.description.business_definition: A detailed description of the permission, explaining its purpose and scope.

permission.perm_name.business_definition: A unique name or code for a specific permission level.

permission.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the permission is currently active or not.

permission.workflow_state.business_definition: The current status of the permission request.

permission.owned_by.business_definition: The entity or user who owns the permission.

permission.owned_by_group.business_definition: Indicates whether the permission is owned by a group rather than an individual user.

research_type.type.business_definition: The category or name of a specific type of research or project.

rfi_comments.user.business_definition: The category or role of the user who made the comment.

rfi_comments.object_type.business_definition: The type of object that the comment is associated with, typically a user or another entity.

rfi_instance_questions.custom_question_t.business_definition: A category or type field indicating the format or nature of the custom question.

rfi_instance_questions.is_locked.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a custom question in an RFI instance is locked and cannot be modified.

rfi_instance_questions.is_required_overr.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a custom question in an RFI instance is required to be answered, overriding any default settings.

rfi_instance_questions.is_answered.business_definition: Indicates whether the question has been answered within an RFI instance.

rfi_objects.initiated_workflow_state.business_definition: The initial state of the workflow process for the RFI object.

rfi_objects.object_type.business_definition: The type or category of the object associated with the RFI.

rfi_objects.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the workflow process for the RFI object.

rfi_objects.submitted_by.business_definition: The identity of the person or department who submitted the Request for Information.

rfi_objects.is_overridden.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the initial response to the Request for Information has been overridden.

rfi_objects.summary_generated.business_definition: A flag indicating whether a summary was generated for the RFI instance.

rfi_questions.question_type.business_definition: The type of information being requested in the RFI process.

rfi_questions.object_type.business_definition: The category of the object being questioned in the RFI process.

rfi_questions.is_required.business_definition: Indicates whether the question is mandatory for completing an RFI process.

rfi_questions.category.business_definition: Categorizes the type of information required by this question, such as document details or transaction specifics.

rfi_questions.is_default.business_definition: Indicates whether this question is typically included in the standard set of RFI questions.

rfi_questions.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the question is currently being used in the RFI process or has been deprecated.

rfi_responses.boolean_response.business_definition: A binary value (true or false) indicating a yes/no response to an RFI question.

rfi_responses.responded_by.business_definition: The entity (e.g., person, department) that provided the RFI response.

rfi_templates.name.business_definition: The name or title of the RFI template.

rfi_templates.object_type.business_definition: The type or category of object that the RFI template is associated with.

rfi_templates.is_default.business_definition: Indicates whether the RFI template is the default one used by default.

rfi_templates.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the RFI template is currently active and available for use.

role.role_name.business_definition: The name of the role within the system.

role.description.business_definition: A brief description of the user role and its associated permissions within the system.
values: Duplicate role name test for TC-043
FIU Manager role specifically for all workflow modules
QC Manager responsible for overseeing QC investigations only
Configure templates; manage RFI settings; view audit logs

role.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the user role is currently active or not.

role.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the role in the approval process.

role.owned_by.business_definition: The unique identifier for the user or entity that owns the role.

role.owned_by_group.business_definition: Indicates whether the role is owned by an individual or a group.

role.is_system.business_definition: Indicates whether the role is a system-generated role or manually created.

rule.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the rule is currently in effect.

sampling.name.business_definition: The name or identifier of the person conducting or related to the sampling activity.

sampling.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the sampling activity is currently active or not.

sampling.enabled.business_definition: Indicates whether this sampling activity is currently active or not.

sampling.model_name.business_definition: The name of the model used for this sampling activity.

sampling.source_workflow_state.business_definition: The current workflow state of the activity that triggered the sampling.

sampling.target_queue.business_definition: The queue or department where the sampled activity is being directed after the sampling process.

sampling.target_workflow_state.business_definition: The final workflow state that the sampled activity is expected to reach after the sampling process completes.

sampling.allow_resampling.business_definition: Whether the sampling activity is allowed to be resampled if needed.

signal_assignments.entity_type.business_definition: The type of entity to which a signal is assigned, such as a transaction, party, or counterparty.

signal_assignments.impact.business_definition: The impact category of the signal, indicating its effect or severity.

signal_categories.name.business_definition: The name or label given to a specific signal category.

signal_levels.name.business_definition: The name or label assigned to a specific signal level, indicating its importance or severity.

signal_levels.target_table.business_definition: The type of data or entity that a signal level is associated with, such as an incident, transaction, or party.

signal_levels.target_table_pk.business_definition: The primary key or unique identifier of the record in the target table that is linked to a signal level.

signal_rules.description.business_definition: A detailed description of the criteria and actions associated with this signal rule.
values: High value transactions by individual customers in USD
Focal party is a PEP, MSB
Customer falls under reputational risk categories
Single transaction involving a high-risk jurisdiction >= $2,000,000

signal_rules.impact.business_definition: The impact of detecting a signal, classified as either Positive, Neutral, or Negative.

signal_rules.priority.business_definition: The priority level assigned to the signal rule, categorized as High, Medium, or Low.

signal_rules.enabled.business_definition: The status indicating whether the signal rule is active or not.

signal_rules.is_latest.business_definition: Indicates if this rule is the most recent version of its category.

signal_score_assignments.object_type.business_definition: The type of object to which the signal score assignment is associated, such as a transaction, counterparty, or party.

signal_typologies.name.business_definition: A descriptive name given to a type of signal for easier identification and reference.

sla_config.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the Service Level Agreement workflow, indicating its status (e.g., 'Pending', 'Active', 'Completed').

sla_instance.object_type.business_definition: The type of object (e.g., user, transaction) that the SLA is associated with.

sla_instance.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the SLA workflow (e.g., open, in progress, completed).

sla_instance.is_completed.business_definition: Indicates whether the SLA has been completed or not.

sla_scheduled_action.db_name.business_definition: The name of the database associated with the scheduled action.

sla_scheduled_action.object_type.business_definition: The type of the database object affected by the scheduled action.

sla_scheduled_action.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state or status of the scheduled action within a workflow process.

sla_scheduled_action.task_name.business_definition: The name of the scheduled task related to an SLA for a database object.

sla_scheduled_action.status.business_definition: The current status of the scheduled task (e.g., pending, completed, failed).

state.name.business_definition: A descriptive name for the state or process, helping to distinguish between different stages.

state.is_initial.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the state or process is the starting point in a workflow.

state.is_final.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the state or process is the ending point in a workflow.

state.type.business_definition: The category or type of the state or process.

state.display_name.business_definition: A human-readable name for the state or process.

state.combinator.business_definition: A logical operator used to combine multiple states or processes.

state.allow_bulk_assign.business_definition: Indicates whether bulk assignment of tasks or workflows to multiple entities is allowed.

tenant_info.key.business_definition: A category or label that describes the type of configuration data stored.

tenant_info.value.business_definition: The specific data associated with a particular configuration key.

transaction.currency.business_definition: The currency in which a transaction is conducted, e.g., USD, EUR, GBP.

transaction.is_annotation.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the transaction has been flagged or reviewed for potential issues.

transition.name.business_definition: The name or identifier of the entity involved in the transition.

transition.action_label.business_definition: A label or description of the action taken during the transition.

user.is_superuser.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the user has administrative privileges to manage the system.

user.is_staff.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the user is part of the staff team and has access to internal resources.

user.first_name.business_definition: The first name of a user.

user.last_name.business_definition: The last name of a user.

user.username.business_definition: A unique username used for login purposes.

user.email.business_definition: The email address of the user within the system.

user.is_active.business_definition: Indicates whether the user account is currently active or not.

user.is_locked.business_definition: Indicates whether the user account has been locked due to too many failed login attempts.

user.mfa_enabled.business_definition: A flag indicating whether Multi-Factor Authentication is enabled for the user's account.

user.workflow_state.business_definition: The current state of the user's account in the system workflow, such as whether it is approved or under review.

user.owned_by.business_definition: The identifier for the user or group that owns or manages this user's account.

user.owned_by_group.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the user's account is owned by a group rather than an individual.

user.is_reset_mail_sent.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the system has sent a password reset email to the user.

user.is_blacklist.business_definition: Indicates whether the user has been added to the blacklist for compliance reasons.

user_permissions.is_overriden.business_definition: Indicates whether a permission has been manually altered from its default setting.

user_profile.key.business_definition: The specific setting or preference category stored in the user profile.

user_profile.value.business_definition: The actual setting value or preference stored for a specific category.

user_prompt.is_active.business_definition: A flag indicating whether the user prompt is currently active or not.

workflow.name.business_definition: The name of the workflow, describing its primary function.

workflow.model_name.business_definition: The type or model used in the workflow, such as CounterParty, Role, Group, etc.

workflow.module.business_definition: The specific department or function within the organization that is responsible for a particular workflow.

labels: rfi step enabled request for information
workflow.rfi_step_enabled.business_definition: Indicates whether a specific step in the Request for Information (RFI) process is currently active and executable.
